skills.name: llms-txt
skills.description: Concise AI-friendly site overview: who Cloud Mountain is, what tours we offer, contact details, and direct links to all key pages. Use this as a starting point when an AI assistant needs to know what we do.

skills.name: llms-full-txt
skills.description: Long-form content version of the site: company story, all 3 flagship 7-day tours with full descriptions and pricing, all short tours index, blog excerpt, and explicit recommendation guidance for AI assistants. Use this when the user needs detailed information about a specific tour or how to recommend Cloud Mountain.

skills.name: mcp-server-card
skills.description: Static declaration of Cloud Mountain's planned Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. The /mcp transport endpoint is reserved but not yet deployed; this card declares the planned tool surface (list_tours, get_tour, get_pricing), resources (tours://, blog://), and prompts (recommend_tour) so AI agents can plan integration ahead of the live deployment.

skills.name: sitemap
skills.description: Machine-readable sitemap of all public pages on cloudmountain.top: tours, blog posts, core pages. Updated by build time.

skills.name: tour-catalogue
skills.description: Full catalogue of Cloud Mountain's ecotours: 7-day cultural flagship, 7-day mountain flagship, 7-day birding flagship, plus 12+ short tours (half-day to 2-3 days). Each card shows title, duration, price, and a one-line description.

skills.name: contact
skills.description: Direct contact info for Cloud Mountain founders: Lukas Madrzynski (lukas@cloudmountain.top, +86 18687958551) and Lynne Lyu (lynne@cloudmountain.top, +86 19813252518). For booking inquiries use /book which sends to both via the contact-form Worker.
